Name: Example ICP Name
Description: One-paragraph description of who this ICP is and why they buy. Used by HubSpot AI features for context — not always shown in the Create ICP form.
Business Type: Operational business type (e.g., 'Multi-Unit Restaurant Chain', 'Healthcare System', 'Equipment Distributor')
Job Titles: Title One; Title Two; Title Three; Title Four (semicolons separate, items can contain commas internally like 'Director, Operations / Strategy')
Industry: Industry Tag One, Industry Tag Two, Industry Tag Three
Interests: First buying motivation as a clause; Second motivation; Third motivation; Fourth motivation; Fifth motivation
Other:
PAIN POINTS: Operational pain one. Operational pain two. Operational pain three.

BUYING TRIGGERS: Trigger event that prompts purchase. Another trigger. Another trigger.

DECISION CONTEXT: Who decides, what they evaluate, what wins.

Name: Example Channel ICP
Description: Channel partners — distributors, dealers, resellers — that move the client's product to operators. Different decision-makers and economics from end users.
Job Titles: VP of Sales; VP of Purchasing; Director of Equipment; Category Manager; Project Sales Manager
Interests: Margin and shelf-velocity per line; Manufacturer support quality; Lead-time reliability; Marketing co-op funds; Spec-side competence
Other:
PAIN POINTS: Common channel partner frictions.

BUYING TRIGGERS: When channel partners add or drop a manufacturer line.

DECISION CONTEXT: How channel decisions get made.
